role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained neutral.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and settlement patterns.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents adhered to their domains, provided image-grounded evidence, and correctly identified Australia as the only viable candidate. The final prediction was correct.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of eucalyptus, sandy soil, and dry grass match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified eucalyptus morphology visible in the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described the white metal pipe fencing and brick house.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly linked the specific architectural style to the region.
